/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-metrics-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-metrics-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_performance_collector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-metrics-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_fast_collector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-metrics-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_analyzer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-metrics-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_evidence.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-metrics-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_validation_pipeline.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-metrics-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_mdspan_views.cpp.o" -o euxis-metrics-cpp_tests  libeuxis-metrics-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
